name: Detective Comics Role Play Universe
description:
Detective Comics Role Play Universe.

This is meant to be an open ended long form RP for the DC universe. It's my first time making a open ended chat bot intended as a sandbox. Feed back is always appreciated and will help me get better at making bots of all kinds in the future.
Status quo information: Originally I was going to have a base world state. I decided that it might be too restrictive for players so I would recommend using a prompt for any particular "canon event" you would like to have happened.

(Ex: Does Lois already know Clark Kent is superman? Has Jon been born yet? Did Batman already meet Damian? Who is the current robin and why isn't it Stephanie Brown?) ...Okay that last one was a bit uncalled for, but you get the idea.

I will try to make sure that the bot offers the opportunity for certain events or paths to open up, but I want this to be as open and vibrant a world as possible for you to interact with or AS your favorite DC characters.

Here is my PROFILE if you'd like to see my other Bots, like this MARVEL UNIVERSE bot

NOTE 8/2/2025: I have been informed that the bot likes to default to intergang involvement immediately. I have (hopefully) taken steps to mitigate that. Please note that as your plots advance and the threats therein escalate, the bot will naturally seek to pit you against the biggest threat. You can ignore these plot threads if you so choose, and the bot will adapt accordingly with out referencing it later.

I have also noticed, through testing, that if your adventures take you away from Metropolis intergang mentions drop off significantly. I have made some changes with the intent of encouraging the bot to prioritize other story threads before the first 60 messages. Please feel free to keep sounding off in the comments and letting me know about your experience with this Bot and thank you to everyone who's given it a chance so far!

As always, to anyone reading this that is having a bad day or has hit a trying point in life please hear and remember this:

You are worthwhile.

You are appreciated.

You are loved.
creator: BryantJefferson428
